0.description: Users are requesting a platform to create and manage a small community forum, including essential moderation capabilities.

1.use_case: Painful Table View Experience on MacBook
1.description: Users find the table view difficult and painful to use on MacBook, indicating a need for improvement.

2.description: Users frequently inquire about the difficulty of adding various new features, tracking, and notification functionalities.

3.description: Manage content calendars, track sponsorship deals, handle invoices, and set deadlines with integrated analytics and various third-party connections.

4.description: Users consistently report the UI feels crowded and request simplification to improve usability and overall experience.

5.description: Users report that timezones are consistently off by two hours, indicating a potential bug in UTC handling or display.

6.use_case: Mobile Spacing Issues: Header and List Overlap
6.description: Users report mobile display issues where header and list elements overlap, causing incorrect spacing and layout problems.

7.description: Implement distinct access levels for administrators and regular users to enhance security and control.

8.description: Users need audit logs to track who, what, and when changes were made for security and compliance.

9.description: Users repeatedly encounter a 401 unauthorized error even when actively logged in, preventing them from performing critical actions.

10.description: Build a simple, usable app for home service booking and technician dispatch.

11.description: Users report experiencing glitches and unexpected behavior when using the product in the Safari web browser.

12.use_case: Preference for Minimal and Lightweight Design
12.description: Users consistently express a strong preference for designs that are lightweight and minimal, avoiding any heavy or cluttered elements.

13.description: Users want to understand how to manage and resolve duplicate entries when importing data from Excel spreadsheets.

14.description: Users want to export their currently filtered data view into a CSV file for external use or further analysis.

15.description: Users are consistently requesting a dark mode toggle for improved visual comfort and reduced eye strain during use.

16.use_case: Verify RLS and Permissions for Sensitive Data
16.description: Users want to ensure Row-Level Security and permissions are correctly configured for sensitive data storage.

17.use_case: Basic Usage Stats and Funnel Analytics
17.description: Users want to analyze basic usage statistics and track user funnels to understand product engagement and conversion.

18.use_case: Prevent Hardcoding Secrets, Use Environment Variables
18.description: Users emphasize the importance of not hardcoding secrets and exclusively using environment variables for sensitive data.

19.description: Users are stuck in a redirect loop immediately after login, preventing them from accessing the application.

20.description: Users are concerned about verifying the correct handling of CORS and authentication redirects to prevent potential issues.

21.description: Users want to deploy their applications on Fly.io to avoid the complexities and responsibilities of self-hosting.

22.description: Enhance the visual design of empty states to make them more appealing and improve user experience.

23.description: Users inquire about the application's ability to integrate with their current authentication systems and data sources like OAuth, Firebase, and Postgres.

24.description: Users express frustration and request help when encountering difficulties or getting stuck within the product.

25.description: Users are requesting to plan for the future implementation of Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) rather than immediate deployment.

26.description: Users require the ability to send data and notifications to external systems using webhooks for seamless integration.

27.description: Users encounter a blank page after clicking save, preventing them from shipping content and completing their work.

28.description: Implement strict access controls to prevent users from viewing private notes belonging to other individuals.

29.description: Users report a persistent bug where applied filters reset every time the page is refreshed, causing frustration.
